act1_blurb: The evening he flew in — wide, then close.

act1_items.alt: Meghan and Owen laughing on the clifftop, a small white chapel and the sea behind them.
Meghan and Owen kissing on the clifftop, the church and sea beyond.
Owen on one knee with the ring as Meghan reacts, on the clifftop terrace above the sea.
A blue door beside the sea-wall, the couple holding hands and the headland beyond.

act2_blurb: Closer in — the part we brought home with us.

act2_items.alt: Meghan and Owen in a close embrace against a whitewashed wall, she in a blue floral dress.
Meghan and Owen walking hand in hand down the stone clifftop path toward the sea.

closing: More to come — a second set from Central Park, and the wedding day in New Jersey.
